ddls:
CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the family */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the household */,
  "household_income" INTEGER /* Annual household income */,
  "annual_pet_expenses" INTEGER /* Annual expenses on pets */,
  "total_pets" INTEGER /* Total number of pets owned by the family */,
  "years_of_pet_ownership" INTEGER /* Number of years the family has owned pets */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* Address line 1 of the family's residence */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Address line 2 of the family's residence */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the family resides */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the family record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the family record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pets" (
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pet */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family owning the pet */,
  "pet_name" TEXT /* Name of the pet */,
  "pet_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet type (e.g., dog, cat, bird) */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the pet */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the pet in years */,
  "health_records" TEXT /* Health records of the pet */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the pet was acquired */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the pet */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the pet */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the pet */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the pet record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the pet record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pets_pet_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_type_id") REFERENCES pet_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pets_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pet_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet associated with the expense */,
  "expense_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense category (e.g., food, healthcare, grooming) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount spent on the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the expense */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_expenses_expense_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_expenses_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pet_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pet type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pet type (e.g., Dog, Cat, Bird) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pet type */,
  "average_life_expectancy" INTEGER /* Average life expectancy of the pet type */,
  "average_height" TEXT /* Average height of the pet type */,
  "average_weight" TEXT /* Average weight of the pet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense category (e.g., Food, Healthcare, Grooming) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense category */,
  "average_annual_expense" INTEGER /* Average annual expense for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., family member, pet care professional, admin) */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family associated with the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the platform */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the platform was accessed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pet_vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet associated with the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination was administered */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination expires */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_vaccinations_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pet_medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet associated with the medical history */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment provided */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the medical history record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the medical history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_medical_history_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pet_ownership_history" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pet associated with the ownership */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership started */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership ended */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pet_ownership_history_pet_id FOREIGN KEY ("pet_id") REFERENCES pets ("pet_id")
)
